summary: Tested post-refactoring of ContractorDashboard and CrewDashboard into sub-components. All key functionality verified: contractor dashboard loads, job form modal opens with all fields (title, description, tasks, images, trade, address), crew cards show View/Share/Request buttons, crew dashboard loads with stats/referral, online/offline toggle works, Smart Match button present, map markers open JobDetailModal with Message/Share buttons.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All sub-components work correctly post-refactor. ContractorDashboard: Post Job opens JobFormModal with title, description, PunchList Tasks (Add button works, task input appears), Job Images (Choose Files), Trade select (no __cat__ prefix in options), Crew Needed, Start Time, Pay Rate, Location, Preview button. Crew cards show View/Share/Request buttons. CrewDashboard: stats panel (Jobs Done, Rating, Points, Accepted), referral code visible, Online/Offline toggle works (shows toast 'You are now Online'), Smart Match button present, map markers open JobDetailModal with trade/crew/location details and Message Contractor + Share buttons.
passed_tests: JobFormModal has title, description, PunchList Tasks, Job Images, Trade select, Crew Needed, Start Time, Pay Rate, Address fields
Add Task button works - task input appears
Crew cards show View/Share/Request buttons (4+ each)
Crew sidebar shows Your Stats (Jobs Done, Rating, Points, Accepted), My Active Jobs
Online/Offline toggle works (toast confirms state change)
Map markers clickable - JobDetailModal opens with job details and Message Contractor/Share buttons
